Petition For Removal Of Executor Eumene Ching
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for Eumene Ching, Executor (via Zoom).
David Tillotson for Samuel Talbot, Objector (via Zoom).

The Court noted that examiner's notes issued late last year had not been cleared. Mr. Tillotson explained that after review of a recently filed declaration by the decedent's spouse, the issues of uncertainty were resolved, and his client now believes the estate is insolvent. Mr. Tilotson stated that his client will no longer pursue the petition for letters of administration or the petition to remove the personal representative and intends to withdraw both petitions.

The Court then inquired whether the remaining petition for final distribution could proceed without delay due to ongoing discussion. Mr. Wrobel confirmed that any continued discussions would not impede final distribution.

Following discussion, the Court took the Amended Petition for First and Final Account, Compensation, and Final Distribution under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Continued To Nov-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared via zoom for Eumene Ching (petitioner).
Katelyn Wheeler appeared via zoom for Sam Talbot.
Cyn Haueter appeared via zoom for Daniel Talbot.
Young Mi Kim appeared via zoom (pro per).

Mr. Wrobel stated that there is only $9,000.00 in assets in the bank, that the proceeds from the sale of property went to the creditor. The Court suggested filing a Petition if the parties wanted to remove Ms. Ching as executor. Both matters are continued to November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution Under Probate Code 11700
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cyn Haueter and Katelyn Wheeler appeared by zoom for and with Daniel Talbot by zoom.
Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Eumene Ching (administrator).

Mrs. Wheeler presented oral argument to support her position as to why the estate should be distributed by intestacy and explained why they did not file a petition to invalidate the trust. Mr. Wrobel stated that he agrees with the court that Daniel does not have standing, that the prayer does not request any distribution to the nephews and asked the court to deny the petition. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution Under Probate Code 11700 is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Thomas Wrobel, Esq. for Eumene Ching (Petitioner). Katelyn Wheeler, Esq. for Daniel Talbot (Interested Party). Lisa Laws Kohli, Esq. for Young Mi Kim (Creditor/Requestor).

The Court stated that the competing petition was taken off calendar and that the only thing that would be done today would be admitting the will and opening the probate. The Court asked if anyone was appearing to object. Hearing no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 12/14/05 is admitted to probate.
Eumene Ching is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $201,000.00. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for February 6, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
